response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz and re:cinq, plus current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work that maps to the AI agent development requirement. React, MongoDB, Docker, and Git are all present. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest specifically, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) suggests strong ramp-up ability.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production
Current AI-agent and MCP framework work directly matches AI agent requirement
Strong engineering culture: TDD, trunk-based dev, teaching/workshops, OSS founder
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java recent experience listed
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate niche tooling preference
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond mention
